name: cassia senna
title: best benefits of cassia senna
description: Cassia senna improves digestion, which refers to the process of breaking down food into nutrients that can be absorbed and utilized by the body. This benefit is important because poor digestion can lead to a range of issues, including bloating, gas, abdominal pain, and malnutrition, which can negatively impact overall health and well-being, as seen in cases of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and gastrointestinal disorders.
